channel.title: Flyback Electronics
channel.description: In-depth electronics insights, deep dives, analysis and emerging trends in semiconductors, AI, and robotics.

item.title: AI Chip Market Growth: 2024–2028 Forecast
item.description: Analyzing the $120B trajectory of AI accelerator silicon and who stands to dominate.
item.author: Alex Chen

item.title: RISC-V vs ARM: The Battle for Edge Dominance
item.description: How the open ISA is reshaping the microcontroller and embedded processor landscape.
item.author: Maya Patel

item.title: Semiconductor Supply Chain Risk Report 2025
item.description: Mapping geopolitical dependencies and single-point failures in global chip manufacturing.
item.author: Jordan Lee

item.title: The Silicon Brain: Neuromorphic Computing Explained
item.description: From neuromorphic chips to photonic computing — the frontier beyond von Neumann architecture.
item.author: Sam Torres

item.title: Graphene's Promise for Flexible Electronics
item.description: Moving beyond the hype: manufacturing challenges and the reality of flexible screens.
item.author: Alex Chen

item.title: Power Electronics Revolution: GaN and SiC Take Over
item.description: Wide-bandgap semiconductors are displacing silicon in EV chargers, solar inverters, and data centres.
item.author: Maya Patel

item.title: The HBM3 Memory Wars: Samsung vs SK Hynix vs Micron
item.description: AI training clusters demand memory bandwidth that GDDR6 cannot provide. Enter High Bandwidth Memory.
item.author: Jordan Lee

item.title: Quantum Computing: Where Are We Actually?
item.description: Cutting through the noise on qubit counts, error correction, and when quantum advantage will matter.
item.author: Sam Torres

item.title: PCB Design in 2025: Signal Integrity at 100+ Gbps
item.description: High-speed serial design challenges, material choices, and simulation-driven layout strategies.
item.author: Alex Chen

item.title: Open-Source EDA Tools: The KiCad Revolution
item.description: How free PCB design software went from hobbyist curiosity to professional-grade production tool.
item.author: Maya Patel

item.title: EV Battery Technology: Solid-State vs Lithium-Ion
item.description: Timeline, energy density claims, and the manufacturing challenges of solid-state batteries.
item.author: Jordan Lee

item.title: Radar on a Chip: How mmWave Sensing Works
item.description: The technology inside automotive radar, gesture sensors, and through-wall imaging systems.
item.author: Sam Torres

item.title: The 3nm Node Race: TSMC N3 vs Samsung SF3
item.description: A technical comparison of leading-edge process technologies and what they mean for chip designers.
item.author: Alex Chen

item.title: MEMS Sensors: The Invisible Engine of Modern Electronics
item.description: How micro-electromechanical systems found their way into every device you own.
item.author: Maya Patel

item.title: Power Management IC Design: The Unsung Hero
item.description: PMICs regulate every voltage rail on every chip — and designing them is harder than it looks.
item.author: Jordan Lee

item.title: Chiplet Architecture: The End of Monolithic SoCs?
item.description: How disaggregation, UCIe, and advanced packaging are reshaping semiconductor economics.
item.author: Sam Torres

item.title: Antenna Design for 5G mmWave Devices
item.description: Phased arrays, beam steering, and the engineering challenges of 28 GHz in a smartphone.
item.author: Alex Chen

item.title: The Open Hardware Movement: OSHWA and the Future of Design
item.description: How open-source principles are disrupting proprietary hardware ecosystems.
item.author: Maya Patel

item.title: Thermal Management in High-Power Electronics
item.description: From heat pipes to vapour chambers — keeping chips cool as power densities climb.
item.author: Jordan Lee

item.title: Embedded Linux vs RTOS: Choosing the Right Foundation
item.description: A pragmatic decision framework for firmware engineers facing the OS choice.
item.author: Sam Torres
